        public AssumptionFormula(Taclet taclet,

    • Method Detail

      • getConditions

        public TacletConditions getConditions()

      • getFormula

        public Term getFormula(TermServices services)
        Specified by:
        getFormula in interface TacletFormula
        Parameters:
        services - TODO
        Returns:
        the formula of the instance if the taclet is translatable otherwise null. If the translation of the taclet consists of several instantiations (e.g. the taclet has some generic sorts) the returned term is a conjunction of these instantiations.

      • getTaclet

        public Taclet getTaclet()
        Specified by:
        getTaclet in interface TacletFormula
        Returns:
        the taclet of the instance.

      • getStatus

        public String getStatus()
        Specified by:
        getStatus in interface TacletFormula
        Returns:
        if the taclet can not be translated the reason why. Otherwise a empty string.

      • getInstantiations

        public Collection<Term> getInstantiations()
        Description copied from interface: TacletFormula
        It can be that a taclet is translated into several formulas, i.e. in the case that the generics are instantiated. This method returns the set of resulting formulas.
        Specified by:
        getInstantiations in interface TacletFormula
